prompt: I need an advertorial for my weight loss product. Product: 'MetaFire Drops' — sublingual liquid drops targeting men and women 35–55 who've tried every diet and exercise program and can't lose weight. Expert persona: Dr. James Holloway, MD, former CDC researcher turned integrative medicine physician. Root cause mechanism: 'brown adipose tissue (BAT) deficiency'. Key ingredients: Perilla Frutescens, Kudzu Root Extract, Holy Basil, White Korean Ginseng. Industry being disrupted: $72 billion weight loss industry. Regular price $79/bottle, discounted to $39/bottle with 6-bottle bundle at $33/bottle. 180-day guarantee. Opening patient story: Dave, 47, truck driver, father of three, came to the clinic after his cardiologist told him he had 6 months to lose 60 pounds or he'd need heart surgery.
assertions: The output is a complete HTML file starting with <!DOCTYPE html>
Dr. James Holloway and CDC background are mentioned
The BAT (brown adipose tissue) mechanism is explained
All 4 ingredients present: Perilla Frutescens, Kudzu Root, Holy Basil, White Korean Ginseng
Dave's patient story is in The Moment Everything Broke section
The product MetaFire Drops is named in the product introduction section
Pricing of $39 or $33 per bottle is mentioned
JavaScript for sticky bar is embedded
Medical and FDA disclaimer is present in footer
